name: github-notifier-pro
description: GitHub notifications in your browser toolbar

scripts.ci: npm run test && npm run lint:fix && npm run format
scripts.dev: npm run ci && npm run dev:firefox
scripts.all: npm run ci && npm run build
scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && zip -r dist/github-notifier-pro-chrome.zip manifest.json src/ images/ -x '*.DS_Store' '*.git*' '*node_modules*' '*.md' && mkdir -p dist/tmp-firefox && cp manifest-firefox.json dist/tmp-firefox/manifest.json && cp -r src images dist/tmp-firefox/ && (cd dist/tmp-firefox && zip -r ../github-notifier-pro-firefox.zip manifest.json src/ images/ -x '*.DS_Store' '*.git*' '*node_modules*' '*.md') && rm -rf dist/tmp-firefox && echo '✨ Build complete! Chrome & Firefox packages in dist/'
scripts.dev:firefox: rm -rf dist/firefox-dev && mkdir -p dist/firefox-dev && cp manifest-firefox.json dist/firefox-dev/manifest.json && cp -r src dist/firefox-dev/ && cp -r images dist/firefox-dev/ && echo '🦊 Firefox dev environment ready at dist/firefox-dev/'

author: euxx
